azure-devops.label: Azure DevOps focus
azure-devops.plan_line: Azure DevOps for work items, boards, repos, pull requests, and pipelines — the Microsoft-shop Jira + GitHub.
azure-devops.base_notes: Search and read Azure DevOps via the official azure-devops-mcp server: work items and boards, repositories and pull requests, wikis, pipelines and builds, and test plans. The Microsoft-shop equivalent of Jira (work tracking) plus GitHub (repos/PRs). Read-only — the local server ships write tools and has no read-only flag, so read-only is enforced by the connecting account / PAT (use read-only scopes); never create, edit, or transition work items, comment, queue pipelines, or push branches.
